modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to activate Office Pro Plus on Mac due to account restrictions.

full_description_text: 
The user was trying to activate Office Pro Plus on their Mac but encountered an error message. It stated that their account doesn't allow editing on a Mac, which was confusing for them. They were advised to contact their Admin for more information about their office plan.
short_description: Unable to activate Office Pro Plus on Mac due to account restrictions.
description: The user was trying to activate Office Pro Plus on their Mac but encountered an error message. It stated that their account doesn't allow editing on a Mac, which was confusing for them. They were advised to contact their Admin for more information about their office plan.
